finding_results.notes: Ren still withholds the name, but the scene now makes the cost immediate: naming him would collapse the room into a single dead cop, Jet is already physically pivoting toward the precinct wall, and both Jet and Faye react on-page to that boundary.
finding_results.summary: The partner-name beat now has a concrete, scene-active consequence instead of an unexplained postponement.

finding_results.summary: The late confrontation no longer circles the same thesis; it escalates through new information, method, and a tangible handoff of responsibility.
